papers.title: Colby Adcock’s Scout AI raises $100M to train its models for war: We visited its bootcamp
papers.title_zh: Colby Adcock’s Scout AI raises $100M to train its models for war: We visited its bootcamp
papers.tldr_zh: We visited Scout AI's training ground where it's working on
papers.cover_zh: We visited Scout AI's training ground where it's working on
papers.abstract_zh: We visited Scout AI's training ground where it's working on AI agents that can help individual soldiers control fleets of autonomous vehicles.
